Use the `$docs-sync` skill logic even if you do not invoke it explicitly.

Compare recent code changes with the repository docs.

Check for drift in:
- architecture notes
- setup and onboarding
- release checklist or changelog
- migration or rollback notes
- operational guidance
- observability and runbooks

Output format:
# Docs drift report
## Docs that should change now
## Docs debt noticed
## No-op confirmation
